violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Per manager, wife will submit application by end of day. ServSafe expires 2027. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Raw animal foods (fish) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (limes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC to review storage procedures with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Per PIC, New menus will be printed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Boxes of fish were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (limes) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Spanish food storage poster provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Various TCS foods was observed held at below 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC foods were recently cooked. Foods were reheated. Foods must be maintained above 135 or below 41 degrees. Food should not be held out of temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Various TCS foods were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were relocated to refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Various food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Cutting board disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The tiles near the 3-bay sink area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Per interview with PIC, prep sink is not in use and will be removed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
Pot were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Mor Santo(orange juice and milk mixture) was observed held at (46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Per interview with PIC, food product was prepped an hour prior to inspection were moved to another refrigeration unit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food in unit until repaired/serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The following non-food contact surfaces of have accumulation of debris: 1.shelves in walk in cooler and throughout kitchen observed with food and/or other debris. 2.shelves in front counter area (rodent droppings and other debris). New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The ceilings in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
The floors in the walk in freezer area is in poor repair(broken tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The floors throughout the facility including walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
